title: How do I open a settings page after installation?
excerpt:
I want to create a settings page that is displayed to the user after installing the app I’m building, but can’t quite figure it out from the docs.

posts.author: benjineering (Ben Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to create a settings page that is displayed to the user after installing the app I’m building, but can’t quite figure it out from the docs.

So far I’ve created an account settings view feature, but I can’t figure out how to direct the user there after installation.

I see this question was also asked here and not answered a couple of years ago, but thought I’d add a new post with more relevant tags /#/t/20612
